hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *apps/studio/*) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pnpm exec prettier --config prettier.config.mjs --write "$f" && case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) pnpm --filter=studio exec eslint --fix "$f" ;; esac ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
